title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in East New York, Brooklyn
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in East New York, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: East New York residents facing bat infestations need professional help to safely remove these protected animals and prevent their return. Our bat removal and exclusion services provide humane, effective solutions for homes and businesses throughout East New York, Brooklyn. With years of experience serving the community, we ensure your property is bat-free and properly sealed against future intrusions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in humane bat removal throughout East New York, using proven exclusion techniques that comply with wildlife protection laws. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's residential and commercial properties, providing thorough inspections, safe removal, cleanup, and permanent exclusion solutions tailored to your building's specific needs.
localContext: East New York's mix of historic row houses, multi-family buildings, and commercial structures along Atlantic Avenue and Pitkin Avenue often provide ideal roosting sites for bats in attics, chimneys, and wall voids. The area's older architecture, particularly near the Brooklyn-Queens border and around Gateway Center, requires specialized exclusion techniques to prevent bats from returning while preserving building integrity.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in East New York?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in East New York typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bats are protected wildlife in New York, so removal must be done humanely by licensed professionals. We use exclusion methods that allow bats to leave naturally but prevent re-entry, complying with all local and state regulations while ensuring your property is protected.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my East New York home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds in attics or walls at dusk or dawn, droppings (guano) that look like mouse droppings but crumble to dust, staining around entry points, and seeing bats flying around your property at twilight. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: How long does the bat exclusion process take?
faqs.answer: The complete bat exclusion process typically takes 2-4 weeks, depending on the colony size and season. We install one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to exit but not return, then seal all entry points permanently once we confirm all bats have left. Timing is crucial, as exclusion cannot be performed during maternity season (May-August) when flightless young are present.
